name: scotthsieh-projen-statemachine

metadata.name: scotthsieh-projen-statemachine
metadata.summary: An example construct for deploying to npm, PyPi, Maven, and Nuget with Amazon API Gateway and AWS Step Functions.

modules.name: scotthsieh_projen_statemachine

methods.name: scotthsieh_projen_statemachine.StateMachineApiGatewayExample.state_machine
documentation: the representation of a state machine.

Converted from an AWS Blog post.

It is the first example mentioned in https://aws.amazon.com/tw/blogs/compute/introducing-amazon-api-gateway-service-integration-for-aws-step-functions/.
This constcut will create an API Gateway Rest API with two methods and
are manipulated by a state machine managed in AWS StepFucntions.
